beforeEnrollmentChecklist.title: Internships are a great way to gain hands-on experience, build your resume, and strengthen ties to local organizations and communities. 5 credits of approved internships can count towards the major’s upper division elective requirement. Contact Anna Lovász to learn more: plovi@uw.edu .
